CustomField.description: Counts the number of days since the Opportunity Stage was last changed.
CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK( Date_Opportunity_Closed__c ) , TODAY() - Last_Stage_Change_Date__c , Date_Opportunity_Closed__c - Last_Stage_Change_Date__c)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Counts the number of days since the Opportunity Stage was last changed.
CustomField.label: Days Since Last Stage Change
